Field Label: Flexors: biceps and finger flexors (at least one)

Flexor synergy: Hand from contralateral knee to ipsilateral ear. From extensor synergy (shoulder adduction/ internal rotation, elbow extension, forearm pronation) to flexor synergy (shoulder abduction/ external rotation, elbow flexion, forearm supination).
Extensor synergy: Hand from ipsilateral ear to the contralateral knee.

Choices: 0, Cannot perform | 1, Hand behind ant-sup iliac spine | 2, Hand to lumbar spine
0, Immediate abduction/elbow flexion | 1, Abduction/elbow flexion during movement | 2, Flexion 90 deg / no abduction or elbow flexion
0, No pron/sup / starting pos impossible | 1, Limited pron/sup / maintains start pos | 2, Full pron/sup / maintains start pos

Field Label: Shoulder abduction 0-90 degrees (elbow at 0, forearm pronated)
Choices: 0, Immediate supination/elbow flexion | 1, Supination/elbow flexion during movement | 2, Abduction 90 deg / maintains ext & pron

Field Label: Shoulder flexion 90-180 degrees (elbow at 0, pron-sup at 0)
Choices: 0, Immediate abduction/elbow flexion | 1, Abduction/elbow flexion during movement | 2, Flexion 180 deg / no abduction or elbow flexion
0, No pron/sup / starting pos impossible | 1, Limited pron/sup / maintains start pos | 2, Full pron/sup / maintains start pos

Field Label: Normal reflex activity (assessed only if full score of 6 in part IV)
Choices: 0, 2 of 3 markedly hyperactive OR score 0 in part IV | 1, 1 reflex markedly hyperactive or >=2 lively | 2, Max 1 reflex lively / none hyperactive

Field Label: Stability at 15 deg dorsiflexion (elbow 90, forearm pronated)
Choices: 0, <15 deg active dorsiflexion | 1, Dorsiflexion 15 deg / no resistance tolerated | 2, Maintains dorsiflexion against resistance

Field Label: Repeated dorsiflexion / volar flexion (elbow 90, forearm pronated)
Choices: 0, Cannot perform volitionally | 1, Limited active ROM | 2, Full active ROM smoothly

Field Label: Stability at 15 deg dorsiflexion (elbow 0, forearm pronated)
Choices: 0, <15 deg active dorsiflexion | 1, Dorsiflexion 15 deg / no resistance tolerated | 2, Maintains dorsiflexion against resistance

Field Label: Repeated dorsiflexion / volar flexion (elbow 0, forearm pronated)
Choices: 0, Cannot perform volitionally | 1, Limited active ROM | 2, Full active ROM smoothly
0, Cannot perform volitionally | 1, Jerky movement or incomplete | 2, Complete and smooth circumduction
